titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 563

div.p: Alexander by the grace of God king of the Scots sends greeting to Prior Algar and the whole community of the church of St Cuthbert. I command and enjoin you that by no means should you enter a plea nor a deraignment in respect of the land of Swinton before it should come before me. I am also making known to you, Lord Prior, that I have many things to say to you privately about many matters, as soon as possible. Farewell.
